mapper.select:
select * from qnaBBS where 1 = 1
and qStatus < 3
and ${keyField} like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by qRef desc, qPos asc

select * from qnaBBS where cNum = #{cNum} and qStatus < 3
and ${keyField} like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by qRef desc, qPos asc
mapper.update: update qnaBBS set qStatus = 3 where qRef = #{qRef}
